# Irms

**Summary**: An analytical technique for measuring the isotopic composition of gas samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-mohammed|Mohammed, 2017]] applied GC-C-IRMS to determine δ13C and δ2H values for hydrocarbon gases.

## Key Results and Findings

- MGIL data enabled clear distinction between Tuwaiq Mountain, Hanifa, and Jubaila Formation gases based on their isotopic signatures. ([[2017-mohammed|Mohammed, 2017, p. 66]])
